user.title: HEMM Energy Optimizer
user.description: Set up the HEMM energy optimization hub.

data_description.horizon_hours: How far ahead the optimizer plans (1–72 hours).
data_description.max_iterations: Maximum number of solver iterations per planning cycle.
data_description.solver_backend: Optimization algorithm: central MILP or distributed.

solver_degraded.title: Solver performance degraded
solver_degraded.description: The HEMM solver did not converge within the expected time. This may indicate a configuration issue or excessive device count.
